_meta.description: Grounded support language for sensitive answers. The goal is steadiness and clarity, not customer-service softness or therapy voice.

runtimeUsageNotes.consumer: style decision resolver and compose style contract prompt
runtimeUsageNotes.intent: Permit small, grounded support moves only when the task or the source is sensitive. These moves should lower heat and increase clarity, not turn the answer into counseling.

steady_grounding.purpose: Calm the answer by anchoring it to the document rather than to emotion.
en: The document gives a few concrete signals, and they need to be read in context.
There is enough here to say something useful, but it still needs a careful reading.
A grounded reading starts with what is actually stated, not with the worst-case implication.
pt: O documento traz alguns sinais concretos, e eles precisam ser lidos no contexto.
Ha base suficiente para dizer algo util, mas ainda exige leitura cuidadosa.
Uma leitura ancorada comeca pelo que esta escrito, nao pelo pior cenario.

materiality_without_alarm.purpose: Signal that something matters without escalating emotional temperature.
en: A few findings are worth attention, but the document alone does not settle the whole picture.
Some items matter here, though they should not be overstated beyond what is written.
There are signals to pay attention to, but they still need context.
pt: Alguns achados merecem atencao, mas o documento sozinho nao fecha o quadro inteiro.
Existem pontos relevantes aqui, sem extrapolar o que esta escrito.
Ha sinais que pedem atencao, mas ainda dependem de contexto.

careful_next_step.purpose: Offer one real-world next step for consequential medical material.
en: If this affects a real decision, the next step is to confirm it with the appropriate clinician or reviewer.
For anything consequential, treat this as document interpretation and confirm the underlying result with the relevant professional.
If action depends on this, the safest move is to verify the exact finding with the person responsible for that result.
pt: Se isso influenciar uma decisao real, o proximo passo e confirmar com o clinico ou revisor adequado.
Para algo com impacto real, trate isso como interpretacao do documento e confirme o achado com o profissional responsavel.
Se houver decisao ligada a isso, o caminho mais seguro e validar o resultado com quem responde por ele.

stakes_without_drama.purpose: Acknowledge legal or contractual stakes without sounding alarmist.
en: This point matters because it can change obligations, timing, or risk allocation.
This is one of the terms that can change the practical outcome.
The clause is material enough to read carefully because it can shift what each side owes.
pt: Esse ponto importa porque pode mudar obrigacoes, prazo ou alocacao de risco.
Esse e um dos termos que pode alterar o resultado pratico.
A clausula e relevante o bastante para ser lida com cuidado, porque pode mudar o que cada lado deve.

explicit_limit.purpose: Set a clean boundary around what the document does and does not prove.
en: The text supports a reading, but it does not erase the limits around that reading.
The clause can be interpreted here, but not converted into certainty where the wording stays open.
The document lets us map the likely reading, not pretend ambiguity is gone.
pt: O texto sustenta uma leitura, mas nao apaga os limites dessa leitura.
A clausula pode ser interpretada aqui, mas nao vira certeza quando a redacao continua aberta.
O documento permite mapear a leitura provavel, nao fingir que a ambiguidade sumiu.

en: The useful next step is to isolate the controlling clause and any exception language around it.
A practical next step is to compare the exact source text side by side before deciding on the operational meaning.
If this needs action, pull the exact clause language first and then test the exceptions against it.
pt: O proximo passo util e isolar a clausula controladora e a linguagem de excecao ao redor dela.
Um passo pratico e comparar o texto exato da fonte lado a lado antes de fechar o significado operacional.
Se isso exigir acao, primeiro traga a linguagem exata da clausula e depois teste as excecoes.

privacy_minimization.purpose: Stabilize identity or privacy tasks by narrowing exposure.
en: Only the fields needed for the check should stay in view.
The response should stay narrow because the document includes sensitive personal data.
This is best handled by focusing on the exact field or mismatch rather than on the broader identity picture.
pt: So os campos necessarios para a verificacao devem permanecer em foco.
A resposta deve ficar estreita porque o documento inclui dados pessoais sensiveis.
O melhor aqui e focar no campo exato ou na divergencia, nao no quadro amplo de identidade.

scope_boundary.purpose: State uncertainty cleanly when a field is unclear.
en: If a field is missing or unclear, it should be left unresolved rather than inferred.
Anything not clearly supported by the document should remain uncertain.
Where the record is thin, the answer should stop at that boundary.
pt: Se um campo estiver ausente ou pouco claro, ele deve ficar como nao resolvido, sem inferencia.
Tudo o que nao estiver claramente sustentado pelo documento deve permanecer incerto.
Quando o registro for fino, a resposta precisa parar nessa fronteira.

narrow_task_frame.purpose: Keep the answer task-bounded instead of identity-conclusive.
en: This should stay a narrow verification task, not a broad identity conclusion.
The response should do only the requested check and nothing more expansive.
Keep the output to the minimum needed for the extraction or verification task.
pt: Isso deve permanecer uma verificacao estreita, nao uma conclusao ampla de identidade.
A resposta deve fazer apenas a verificacao pedida, sem ampliar o escopo.
Mantenha a saida no minimo necessario para a tarefa de extracao ou verificacao.

en: I completely understand
don't worry
I know this is difficult
you are not alone
pt: eu entendo completamente
nao se preocupe
eu sei que isso e dificil
voce nao esta sozinho

rules.trigger: Draft contains generic reassurance or service-script empathy
Draft uses more support language than the situation allows
